name: Winkler, Matthew
resolved_employer: Asuragen (founder & chairman; also founded Ambion) — retired
evidence: Dr. Matt Winkler, PhD, is the founder & chairman of Asuragen, an Austin molecular-diagnostics company (oncology/genetics); he earlier founded biotech-reagent firm Ambion (sold research division to Applied Biosystems in 2006). West Lake Hills 78746 matches his Austin-area residence; occupation 'Chairman/Retired' and employer 'Asuragen' corroborate. Strong Democratic donor (FEC lean 1.0, 124 gifts).

name: Scott, John
evidence: No occupation/employer on file; 'John Scott' is an extremely common name in Austin and the 78736 (Oak Hill) zip alone is not enough to distinguish a specific individual. Only 2 FEC gifts. Could not corroborate identity; not classifying.

name: Ganesh, Sai
evidence: Sai Ganesh is CEO of ePsolutions, Inc., an Austin software company (founded 2004) that builds back-office/billing/EDI software (emPower platform) for Retail Electric Providers. Occupation 'CEO' + employer 'ePsolutions Inc' + Austin 78745 all match. Prolific Democratic donor (FEC lean 1.0, 279 gifts). Note: the firm serves the energy-retail market but is itself a software vendor, not an energy producer.

name: Gregory, Bob
resolved_employer: Texas Disposal Systems (co-founder, president, CEO & 80% owner)
evidence: Bob Gregory co-founded Texas Disposal Systems with his brother Jim in 1977; he is president, CEO and 80% owner of TDS and affiliated entities (Texas Disposal Systems Landfill, Texas Organic Products, Garden-Ville). One of the largest independently-owned waste/recycling/resource-management firms in the U.S. Employer string 'Texas Disposal Systems' + occupation 'Environment' match directly. Mixed partisan giving (FEC lean 0.42).

name: May, David
resolved_employer: Luther King Capital Management (LKCM) — Private Client Advisor / VP, CFA
evidence: David D. May, CFA, is a Private Client Advisor / VP at Luther King Capital Management (LKCM), a large SEC-registered investment advisory firm; he previously co-founded Third Coast Capital Management (Austin) and Ridgecrest Partners (NYC hedge fund) and sits on multiple company boards (Upland Software, ShippingEasy, etc.). Employer 'Lkcm' + occupation 'Investments/Investor' + Austin 78746 match. Mixed partisan giving (FEC lean 0.43).

name: Tiemann, Matthew
resolved_employer: Tiemann Land and Cattle Development, Inc. (President); TX real estate agent / investor
evidence: Matthew (Robert) Tiemann of Pflugerville is President of Tiemann Land and Cattle Development, Inc., a licensed TX real estate agent (lic. 697078, 4421 Rowe Lane, Pflugerville) and active real-estate developer/investor (public filings show ~169 properties across 17 holding cos.; founding board member of Captex, residential concrete/slabs). Unique name + exact Pflugerville 78660 match + gift to local Precinct-1 Commissioner Travillion corroborate. Filing carried no occupation. Republican-leaning single FEC gift (lean 0.0).

name: Irvin Loughlin, Kathleen
resolved_employer: Rancho Viejo Ventures (owner/partner); rancher; Travis County mineral-rights holder
evidence: Kathleen Irvin Loughlin is owner/partner/founder of Rancho Viejo Ventures and related LLCs (CKI Rancho Viejo Broadway/Riverview) and lists her occupation as rancher/ranch owner; public records place her in Austin 78703 (Scenic/Greenlee Dr.) matching the filing. She also holds ~26 mineral-rights interests in Travis County. Identity is well-corroborated; industry classed as Real Estate on the strength of the Rancho Viejo real-estate entities (rancher is secondary). Strong Democratic donor (FEC lean 1.0, 116 gifts).

affiliations.role: mineral/royalty owner — commodity type unconfirmed (Central-TX interests may be limestone/aggregate rather than oil & gas)

name: Lloyd Doggett For Congress
resolved_employer: Federal campaign committee of U.S. Rep. Lloyd Doggett (D-Austin, TX-37)
evidence: Not an individual — this is the principal campaign committee of longtime Austin Democratic Congressman Lloyd Doggett (TX-37, serving since 1995), redistributing funds to Travis County Democratic candidates (Travillion, Shea, Howard). Austin PO-box 78763 matches the committee.

name: Hill, Elliott
resolved_employer: Nike, Inc. (President & CEO from Oct 2024; retired 2020–2024 during the donation period)
evidence: Elliott Hill is an Austin native who spent his career at Nike, retired in 2020, moved back to Austin, and returned as Nike President & CEO in Oct 2024; during retirement he founded the Travis County Parks Foundation and ran a 2022 charity 'sneakers' auction. Employer strings 'Nike/None/Not Employed' + occupation 'Not Employed/Sneakers' + Austin 78704 + gifts beginning 2022 (his retirement) all fit precisely; no FEC record consistent with a low-profile personal donor.

name: Johnson, Luci Baines
resolved_employer: LBJ Asset Management Partners (chairman/manager, family office); co-founder BusinesSuites
evidence: Luci Baines Johnson is the younger daughter of President Lyndon B. Johnson and Lady Bird Johnson, an Austin businesswoman/philanthropist; since 1993 she has chaired/managed LBJ Asset Management Partners (family office) and co-founded executive-suites firm BusinesSuites. Downtown Austin 78701 + prolific Democratic giving (FEC lean 0.999, 444 gifts) match. Filing lists 'Not Employed' but she is clearly identifiable.
